name: dia-browser-control
description: Control Dia Browser tabs, windows, and navigation
long_description:
This extension allows Claude to interact with Dia Browser, enabling tab management, navigation, page content reading, and browser automation. It uses Chrome DevTools Protocol to control the browser programmatically.

**Setup Required:** Before using this extension, you need to enable remote debugging in Dia Browser:
1. Close Dia Browser completely
2. Launch with: `/Applications/Dia.app/Contents/MacOS/Dia --remote-debugging-port=9222`
3. Or use the included script: `./launch-dia-debug.sh`

This extension is not affiliated with or endorsed by Dia Browser.

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Open a URL in Dia Browser

tools.name: get_current_tab
tools.description: Get information about the current active tab

tools.name: list_tabs
tools.description: List all open tabs in Dia Browser

tools.name: execute_javascript
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the current tab

tools.name: get_page_content
tools.description: Get the text content of the current page
